pari-√dah P. -dahati, to burn round or through or entirely, consume by fire, dry up,  Suśr.  :
Pass. -dahyate (˚ti,  Divyāv. ), to be burnt through or wholly consumed, to burn (lit. and fig.),  MBh. ;  Ṛt.  &c.
